scientific_boundaries.abnativ: VHH nativeness proxy; NA denotes model incompatibility, not negative biology
scientific_boundaries.anarci: ANARCI/IMGT numbering and domain QC; not binding, affinity, purity, or blocking evidence
scientific_boundaries.binding: weak binding priors; not Kd, IC50, or blocking evidence
scientific_boundaries.sapiens: human-likeness proxy; not measured purity or expression
scientific_boundaries.sequence_risk: partial sequence-only proxy; not measured purity or expression
